description: A passenger wants to check in a large item (e.g., a surfboard) that is considered oversized baggage.

nodes.task_description: Measure the item to confirm it is oversized but still within the maximum allowable dimensions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the item can be transported.

nodes.task_description: Inform the passenger of the oversized baggage fee and process the payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates the fee and takes payment.

nodes.task_description: Tag the item and direct the passenger to the special oversized baggage drop-off point.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly tags the bag and provides clear directions.
